nodes.speaker: Kim Kitsuragi
nodes.text: The lieutenant waits for you to choose the next lead.

choices.text: Ask him to follow your lead.

nodes.speaker: Kim Kitsuragi
nodes.text: He nods once. The investigation continues.

nodes.speaker: Kim Kitsuragi
nodes.text: He marks the Whirling, the balcony, and your room as active points of interest.

nodes.speaker: Klaasje
nodes.text: She watches the room from the window, cigarette smoke hanging in the air.

nodes.speaker: Klaasje
nodes.text: She gives you enough to keep moving, but not enough to trust her completely.

nodes.speaker: Klaasje
nodes.text: The balcony becomes a lead. Check it from the world map when you are ready.
